channel.title: Img2PDF Pro - Official Guides & Blog
channel.description: Learn how to resize photos for Indian Govt forms, maintain 100% privacy offline, and use the best free Image to PDF converters.

item.title: How to Resize Photo & Signature for SSC, UPSC (100KB Limits)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to perfectly compress your photo and signature to under 100kb for SSC, UPSC, and Indian Govt application forms.

item.title: The Best iLovePDF Alternative That Protects Your Privacy
item.description: Stop uploading private PAN cards to cloud servers! Discover the ultimate offline, unlimited free alternative to iLovePDF.

item.title: Aadhar Card Photo to PDF Secure Offline Maker
item.description: Merge your Aadhar front and back photos into a single PDF instantly. Compress to 100kb for government forms.

item.title: Photo Ko PDF Kaise Banaye - 100KB Format Hindi Guide
item.description: Bina internet aur app ke photo ko PDF kaise banayein? Seekhiye hindi me step-by-step jisse files safe rahein.
